name: GC-500K Dataset
description: A hierarchical HDF5 dataset of 500,000 grating coupler designs for silicon photonics. Each sample contains five geometric parameters (period, fill factor, etch depth, oxide thickness, silicon thickness), 100-point reflectance, transmittance, and absorbance spectra (1200–1600 nm), derived scalar optical metrics, and energy conservation flags. Generated via a validated analytical model and rigorously validated for statistical independence, physical consistency, and spectral smoothness. Includes a benchmarking study of 23 models across forward scalar/spectrum and inverse scalar/spectrum tasks.

rai.collection: The dataset was generated synthetically via an analytical model with uniform random sampling of geometric parameters. No human subjects or real-world data were used.
rai.ethical_biases: The dataset is purely synthetic and quantitative; there are no harmful social or ethical biases identifiable.
rai.limitations: Generated using a simplified analytical model (scalar effective indices, approximate dispersion). Does not capture full vector-field effects or polarization coupling. Intended for benchmarking, not as a calibrated physical surrogate.
